title: QA Automation Engineer (Playwright) - SPVL
description:
We are looking for a skilled and detail-oriented Quality Engineer to join our team in government sector!

  • Opportunity to work on Singapore's cutting-edge government asset distribution and payment infrastructure
  • Collaborative and innovative team environment, being part of a mission-driven team improving public service delivery
  • Work location: Central (hybrid work arrangement)
  • Candidate with experience in automation tools using Playwright & Python are welcome to apply


What You'll Do

  • Design and execute comprehensive test strategies covering payment processing and item distribution workflows
  • Conduct thorough testing of front-end interfaces, admin portals, distribution tracking systems, and integration testing with other applications
  • Create automated test suites for web applications, RESTful APIs, and inventory management systems
  • Implement performance and scalability testing for high-volume distribution scenarios and payment processing
  • Lead functional testing of distribution tracking, inventory management, and physical/digital redemption flows
  • Support UATs (User Acceptance Testing) with government agencies and distribution partners
  • Test integration points between GovWallet payment systems and GovSupply distribution workflows
  • Ensure quality across the end-to-end process from inventory management to payment processing to physical/digital redemption
  • Front-end Testing: Conduct extensive testing of admin portals and user interfaces to ensure responsiveness, functionality, and compatibility across browsers and devices
  • API & Webhook Testing: Perform thorough testing of RESTful APIs and webhook integrations, ensuring data accuracy, request/response validation, and adherence to industry standards
  • Performance Testing: Evaluate the performance and scalability of web applications, APIs, and webhooks under various load conditions
  • Regression Testing: Execute regression test suites to validate the impact of new features on existing functionalities
  • Security Testing: Collaborate with security teams to validate application security requirements


How to Succeed

  • You enjoy collaborating closely with a passionate and high-performing team.
  • You thrive working in a fast-paced environment.
  • You enjoy coming up with numerous solutions for a wide range of technical problems.
  • You have a strong foundation in software architecture and design patterns.
  • You place a keen emphasis on testing across the entire stack — unit, integration and E2E (end to end).
  • You are experienced at least one scripting language such as JavaScript, Python, or similar for test automation
  • You are able to communicate and work with stakeholders (both technical and non technical) and lead tracks when required
  • You have good communication skills in order to work with development and product teams to understand requirements and design comprehensive test plans
  • Experience with Serverless tools, containers or AWS (Amazon Web Services) is a bonus.


By submitting your resume, you consent to the collection, use, and disclosure of your personal information per ScienTec’s Privacy Policy (scientecconsulting.com/privacy-policy).

This authorizes us to:
Contact you about potential opportunities.
Delete personal data not required at this application stage.
To withdraw consent, email dpo@scientecconsulting.com.
All applications will be processed with strict confidence. Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

Liew Chien Hui - R2090138
ScienTec Consulting Pte Ltd - 11C5781

postedCompany.description:
An award-winning company founded in 2004, ScienTec has transformed organizations across Asia Pacific with our 4 principal services: Staffing, Specialist Search, Outsourcing and HR Consulting.

Our "People First, Always" core value underpins our mission to redefine the standards of HR services and deliver you top-tier candidate support, as reflected in our attainment of key accolades such as Recruitment Agency of the Year, Best Client Service, and Best Candidate Experience.


Our sector and functional coverage include ICT/technology, industrial engineering, and corporate services recruitment.


By submitting your resume, you give your express consent that ScienTec Consulting may use your personal information to process your job application and to contact you from time to time for future employment opportunities.

For further information on how ScienTec Consulting processes your personal information and how to access and correct your information, please read the ScienTec Consulting’s Privacy Policy (https://www.scientecconsulting.com/privacy-policy).

Please do not submit any sensitive personal data to us in your resume (such as government ID numbers, ethnicity, gender, religion, marital status) as we do not collect your personal data at this time.


All job applications will be processed with strict confidence and only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.


ScienTec Consulting Pte Ltd

1 Harbourfront Place, #16-04, Harbourfront Tower One, Singapore 098633

Tel: +65 6225 3272
